# Brex

> Corporate card and financial infrastructure company for modern businesses.

## Compiled Truth

Brex provides corporate cards, expense management, and financial software
primarily targeting startups and enterprise customers.

## Timeline

- **2017** | founding — Founded by Pedro Franceschi and Henrique Dubugras
- **2022** | pivot — Exited SMB market to focus on enterprise and startups
- **2024** | milestone — Reached $500M ARR
